channel.title: Jesse A. Eisenbalm Journal
channel.description: Thoughts on staying human in an increasingly automated world. Digital wellness, mindful skincare, and the philosophy behind Jesse A. Eisenbalm.

item.title: Mindful Gift for Executives: Jesse A. Eisenbalm Lip Balm
item.description: Explore the Jesse A. Eisenbalm lip balm — a mindful gift for executives seeking a grounding ritual in a digital-first world.
item.author: contact@jesseaeisenbalm.com (Jesse A. Eisenbalm)

item.title: The Science of TEWL Lip Care: Beeswax's Hydrating Power
item.description: Explore how Jesse A. Eisenbalm's beeswax lip balm combats TEWL, ensuring lips stay hydrated and protected.
